zh.lifeSummary: 當Adam de Welles 3rd Lord Welles於1304年7月22日出生在英國戴文考金頓時，他的父親Sir Adam de Welles Lord Welles33歲，母親Joan Engaine25歲。他於1327年與Margaret Bardolf在英國諾福爾可喬加結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1320年被列為3rd lord of welles。他去世於大約1344年2月24日在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾格林菲爾德享年39歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾格林菲爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adam de Welles 3rd Lord Welles于1304年7月22日出生在英国戴文考金頓时，他的父亲Sir Adam de Welles Lord Welles33岁，母亲Joan Engaine25岁。他于1327年与Margaret Bardolf在英国諾福爾可喬加结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1320年被列为3rd lord of welles。他去世于大约1344年2月24日在英国英格兰林可爾史爾格林菲爾德享年39岁，埋葬在英国英格兰林可爾史爾格林菲爾德。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Welles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Wells
meanings: English: habitational name from Wells next the Sea (Norfolk) or Wells (Somerset), both named with the plural of Old English wella ‘spring, stream’, or a topographic name for someone who lived near a group of springs or streams.
Americanized form (translation into English) of French   Dupuis   ‘from the well’.
History: One of numerous early immigrants from England bearing this name was Thomas Welles, governor of colonial CT, who was in Hartford, CT, by 1636.

nameMeanings.name: Adam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Adam de Welles 3rd Lord Welles was born on 22 July 1304, in Cockington, Devon, England, his father, Sir Adam de Welles Lord Welles, was 33 and his mother, Joan Engaine, was 25. He married Margaret Bardolf in 1327, in Wormegay, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. In 1320, his occupation is listed as 3rd lord of welles. He died about 24 February 1344, in Greenfield, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 39, and was buried in Greenfield, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adam de Welles 3rd Lord Welles est né le 22 juillet 1304, à Cockington, Devon, Angleterre, son père, Sir Adam de Welles Lord Welles, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Joan Engaine, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Bardolf en 1327, à Wormegay, Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. En 1320, sa profession de son indiquée est 3rd lord of welles. Il est décédé environ 24 février 1344, à Greenfield, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 39 ans, et a été enterré à Greenfield, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adam de Welles 3rd Lord Welles am 22. Juli 1304 in Cockington, Devon, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Adam de Welles Lord Welles 33 und seine Mutter Joan Engaine 25. Er hat 1327 in Wormegay, Norfolk, England Margaret Bardolf geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. 1320 ist sein Beruf als 3rd lord of welles aufgeführt. Er starb um 24. Februar 1344 im Alter von 39 Jahren in Greenfield, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Greenfield, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adam de Welles 3rd Lord Welles è nato il il 22 luglio 1304 nel Cockington, Devon, England, il suo padre, Sir Adam de Welles Lord Welles, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Joan Engaine, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Bardolf nel 1327, nel Wormegay, Norfolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Nel 1320, la sua occupazione è indicata come 3rd lord of welles. Morì circa 24 febbraio 1344, nel Greenfield, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 39 anni, e fu sepolto a Greenfield, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Adam de Welles 3rd Lord Wellesが1304年7月22日にイギリスデボンコクイントンで生まれた時，父Sir Adam de Welles Lord Wellesは33歳，母Joan Engaineは25歳であった。1327年にイギリスノーフォルクウオルメガイでMargaret Bardolfと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。1320年，職業は3rd lord of wellesと記録されている。彼は約1344年2月24日にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアグレエンフィールドで39歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアグレエンフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Adam de Welles 3rd Lord Welles(이)가 1304년 7월 22일 영국 데폰 콕잉턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Adam de Welles Lord Welles(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Engaine(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1327년 영국 노르폴크 워메가이에서 Margaret Bardolf(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1320년, 그의 직업은 3rd lord of welles이었다. 그는 대략 1344년 2월 24일 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 그린필드에서 39세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 그린필드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adam de Welles 3rd Lord Welles nasceu em 22 de julho de 1304, em Cockington, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Adam de Welles Lord Welles, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Joan Engaine, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Bardolf em 1327, em Wormegay, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Em 1320, sua profissão aparece como 3rd lord of welles. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 24 de fevereiro de 1344, em Greenfield, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 39 anos, e foi sepultado em Greenfield, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adam de Welles 3rd Lord Welles родился 22 июля 1304 г. в местности коккингтон, девон, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Adam de Welles Lord Welles было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Joan Engaine, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Bardolf в 1327 г. в местности вормегеи, норфолк, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. В 1320 году он работал по профессии 3rd lord of welles. Он умер около 24 февраля 1344 г. в местности гринфиелд, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 39 лет и был похоронен в местности гринфиелд, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания.
